content.en:
"Black Ancestor!"

Ye Tian had heard of the Black Ancestor, but he didn't know much, he only knew that this was a Ten Realm-level controller, and his status in the Origin Realm Sea was very high, almost a legend.

But after all, his cultivation time is short, and he is not as good as the Yan Yan controllers for a fraction of their cultivation years, and to a certain extent, for some secrets, they are not as good as Yan Yan masters.

For example, the statue of ten thousand phases, he doesn't know.

"Two junior brothers, what is the statue of ten thousand phases?"

Ye Tian asked.

The half-tooth controller held back the excitement in his heart, looked at Ye Tian, and explained: "Senior Brother Ye, the Black Ancestor is a ten-realm-level powerhouse, and there are only a few ten-realm-level masters in the entire Origin Realm Sea, and each of them has a very loud reputation. And Hei Zu is one of them, very mysterious, and his strength is also among the top among the Ten Realm-level controllers, he has refined a lot of Ten Thousand Phase Statues, each of which has a special effect, containing hundreds of millions of changes, and the Ten Thousand Phases Statue helps us create the Origin Control Technique. But the most terrifying ability of the Wanxiang statue is not this, but it is integrated into the body, bursting out with terrifying power, there was once a six-realm-level controller, relying on the Wanxiang statue, forcibly killed a seven-realm-level controller, shocking the origin realm sea. But there are only thirteen statues of Wanxiang that have appeared so far. Moreover, the Black Ancestor had been suppressed and sealed by a terrifying great being, so once every statue of Ten Thousand Phases appeared, it would cause a bloody storm. "

"How can there be a statue of all phases here?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

It stands to reason that it is impossible for such a noble treasure to remain here, and the owner here should take it away.

Unless this is a secret cave of the Black Ancestor, it is possible that there is a statue of ten thousand phases.

"Senior Brother Ye, is this Cave Heaven Blessed Land Black Ancestor's?"

The half-tooth master guessed.

"Probably. Ye Tian said: "But it doesn't have to be the Black Ancestor at the peak, it is very likely that it is the Cave Mansion when he was not very strong, as for the Wanxiang Statue, it is not too precious for the Black Ancestor, so it will be placed here." "

"It is rumored that Black Ancestor had a statue of Ten Thousand Phases when he had not yet reached the Ten Realms level controller, so some controllers believed that Black Ancestor had a statue of Ten Thousand Phases very early, and at that time he should not be qualified to refine the statue of Ten Thousand Phases, so the statue of Ten Thousand Phases may not have been refined by him. "

"It doesn't matter if the statue of Ten Thousand Phases was refined by the Black Ancestor or not, but it is certain that there is a statue of Ten Thousand Phases here. Ye Tiandao.

The value of a statue of Wanxiang is not known to be many times higher than that of the boundary river monument, and it is far from being comparable to the boundary river monument.

Even a Seven Realms-level controller like the old man of Guishan wants to snatch the statue of Ten Thousand Phases!

"Senior Brother Ye, can this statue allow us to comprehend some years?"

Yan Yan asked.

"The three of us found it together, and it was naturally divided, and this statue will be enlightened by us together. Ye Tian said.

Immediately, they studied this statue of Ten Thousand Phases and found that this statue of Ten Thousand Phases contained many changes in various paths, but it could not be taken away.

Ye Tian tried to take away this statue of Ten Thousand Phases, but found that he couldn't take it away, this statue of Ten Thousand Phases was restrained layer by layer, and it seemed that an incomparably powerful large array made this statue of Ten Thousand Phases locked here.

"Two junior brothers, I can't take away the Wanxiang statue for the time being, at least I need to wait until I am a six-realm level controller before I can hope to crack the magic circle here and take this Wanxiang statue away. Therefore, we can only visit the statue here. "

Ye Tian explained.

He doesn't care, he has a replica body, so even if he keeps coming here to meditate, he doesn't delay anything.

But the Yanyan Controller and the Half Tooth Controller only have one true body, and if they cultivate here, they won't be able to take care of the outside world.

However, the two were not worried at all.

"Senior Brother Ye, then let's stay here to comprehend, it doesn't matter if we comprehend billions of realm river years!"

Said the half-tooth master.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian and the three of them took a look around this quaint hall, where there was a cultivation time and space, as well as a living area.

Suddenly, Ye Tian and the others saw a planting space-time, where a very precious treasure was planted.

"The Purple Thunder Sky Crystal Bamboo takes 100 million realm river years to grow, and there are so many of them growing here!"

Ye Tian was slightly surprised.

Obviously, the owner of this place planted the Purple Thunder Sky Crystal Bamboo here a long time ago, and planted a lot of it at one time.

The Purple Thunder Heavenly Crystal Bamboo is not too difficult to plant, but the seedlings are difficult to obtain, and its value is equivalent to one-tenth of the price of the Purple Thunder Heavenly Crystal Bamboo, and only some strong people above the Seven Realms level control have the heart to plant the Purple Thunder Heavenly Crystal Bamboo.

The function of the Purple Thunder Sky Crystal Bamboo is to guide the thunder and quench the body, and the thunder power contained in the Purple Thunder Sky Crystal Bamboo is enough to kill some Eternal Controllers, but it also contains a strong vitality, which is suitable for refining the Eternal Controller's control body.

And the older the purple thunder crystal bamboo, the better the effect, but the strength requirements are also high.

However, the Purple Thunder Heavenly Crystal Bamboo can only be useful for the seventh-level mastery body at most, and it is useless for the eighth-level mastery body.

And Ye Tian's control body was still at the seventh level, so the Purple Thunder Heavenly Crystal Bamboo was still of great use to him.

The Yan Yan Masters and the Half Tooth Controllers were extremely excited, their control bodies were even lower, only level five.

If they used the Purple Thunder Heavenly Crystal Bamboo to guide the thunder and quench the body, coupled with the Enlightenment Ten Thousand Phases Statue, they would definitely have the hope of being promoted to the realm of controllers above the first realm.

What a chance!

It was their biggest chance ever.

"Thank you, Senior Brother Ye!" Yan Yan and Half Tooth Controllers thanked very excitedly.

"Let's cultivate here in the future, I took a look, and apart from these opportunities, everything else is gone. "

Ye Tiandao.

"Hmm!"

Yan Yan Controller nodded.

Immediately, Ye Tian came to a Purple Thunder Heavenly Crystal Bamboo, this Purple Thunder Heavenly Crystal Bamboo has grown for hundreds of millions of years, and the power contained in it is very terrifying, Yan Yan's controller and half-tooth controller cannot use this Purple Thunder Heavenly Crystal Bamboo to refine their physique, otherwise they will definitely die.

However, it is suitable for Ye Tian.

Immediately, Ye Tian used the thunder power of this Purple Thunder Sky Crystal Bamboo to bombard his controlling body, refining his controlling body when he was bombarded by the power of thunder.

"There are some effects, but the effects need to be tempered for a long time before they can be seen. I'm afraid it will take a long time before I can raise my body of control to the level of level eight. "

Ye Tian muttered.

In the following years, after refining his body of control here for a period of time, he went to visit the statue of ten thousand faces.

In this way, he went back and forth to comprehend and cultivate, and his strength was constantly improving.

But the biggest increase in strength is naturally the Yanyan controller and the half-tooth master, because their strength is low, and the improvement is naturally the largest.
